package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
	"net/http"
)

// scenario for servefile_via_readfile_then_c_data: Handlers that load files into memory and then write them through gin.Context.Data(...) instead of using file helpers or streaming.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: gin; severity: contextual.
type Rule336NegativeRecord struct {
	Name string
}

type Rule336NegativeService interface {
	Handle(context.Context, Rule336NegativeRecord) (Rule336NegativeRecord, error)
}

func scenario336Negative(ctx context.Context, service Rule336NegativeService, input Rule336NegativeRecord) (Rule336NegativeRecord, int) {
	output, err := service.Handle(ctx, input)
	if err != nil {
		return Rule336NegativeRecord{}, http.StatusBadRequest
	}
	return output, http.StatusOK
}
